description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc syntax checks that runs on every push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow consists of multiple jobs, each building and testing C++ code with different standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20) and STL usage (with and without) using GCC on ubuntu-22.04, checking the GCC version and making the build.
